basic_details.job_title: Telangana Anganwadi Teacher & Helper Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 177 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Telangana WD&SC Department, Mahabubnagar has released a notification for 177 Anganwadi vacancies across 4 ICDS projects - Devarkadra, Jadcherla, Mahabubnagar Rural, and Mahabubnagar Urban. Eligible women candidates can apply online at wdcw.tg.nic.in from 20 June 2026 to 30 June 2026 by 5:00 PM. The recruitment fills 64 Anganwadi Teacher (AWT) and 113 Anganwadi Helper (AWH) posts across 177 Anganwadi centres.

application_fee.details: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for Mahabubnagar Anganwadi Recruitment 2026. Candidates from all categories can apply free of cost through the official portal.

qualification.details: Candidates applying for the AWT post should meet the following educational qualification requirements: | Minimum Qualification: 10th Pass (SSC) or equivalent Preferred: Intermediate (10+2) or above Other: Preference may be given to candidates with Early Childhood Care & Education (ECCE) training | Minimum Qualification: Ability to read and write (basic literacy) Must be a resident of the same village/ward where the Anganwadi Centre is located | Gender: Only women candidates are eligible Age Limit: Candidates must be between 18 and 35 years (SC/ST/BC/EWS relaxation as per Telangana Government norms) Residency: Must be a local resident of the respective Gram Panchayat / Ward Marital Status: Both married and unmarried women are eligible | Candidates wondering about age relaxation can note that SC/ST/BC candidates typically receive 5 years of relaxation as per Telangana state government rules, allowing them to apply up to age 40. | Also Read: AMC Assistant Senior Clerk Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 250 Posts

salary_details.details: Anganwadi Workers and Helpers in Telangana receive a monthly honorarium as fixed by the state government. While the exact revised figures should be confirmed from the official order, the approximate pay is: | These are government-fixed honoraria and may include additional incentives under Central/State government welfare schemes.

selection_process: The selection process for Anganwadi Worker and Helper posts in Telangana is merit-based and transparent. Here is a realistic step-by-step overview:
Online Application Submission (20-30 June 2026) Scrutiny of Applications - The ICDS Project team verifies documents and residency proof Merit List Preparation - Based on educational qualifications

with priority given to higher qualifications Document Verification - Shortlisted candidates called for certificate verification Selection / Appointment - Final appointment issued by the District Collector/Chairperson

There is no written examination or interview - selection is purely on merit based on qualifications and local residency. The district-level committee has the authority to cancel the notification or make modifications
as stated in the official notice.
how_to_apply: The application process for Mahabubnagar Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 is entirely online. Here are the steps to apply:
Visit the official Telangana WD&SC portal: http://wdcw.tg.nic.in
Click on the "Anganwadi Recruitment 2026" or relevant notification link
Select Mahabubnagar District and the concerned ICDS Project
Register using your mobile number and basic personal details
Fill in your educational qualifications, residential details, and category
Review all details carefully before final submission
Submit the application before 30 June 2026, 5:00 PM
Save/print the application acknowledgement for future reference
Direct Vacancy PDF link: Download Here

faq.question: Q1. How many Anganwadi vacancies are there in Mahabubnagar district in 2026?
faq.answer: There are 177 total vacancies in Mahabubnagar district, comprising 64 Anganwadi Teacher (AWT) and 113 Anganwadi Helper (AWH) posts.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for Mahabubnagar Anganwadi recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online is 30 June 2026, and the application window opened on 20 June 2026.

faq.question: Q3. How many Anganwadi Teacher (AWT) posts are vacant in Mahabubnagar?
faq.answer: A total of 64 AWT posts are vacant, spread across Devarkadra (7), Jadcherla (24), Mahabubnagar Rural (18), and Mahabubnagar Urban (15).

faq.question: Q4. How many Anganwadi Helper (AWH) posts are vacant in Mahabubnagar?
faq.answer: A total of 113 AWH posts are vacant, with Jadcherla alone accounting for 49 of these, the highest among all four projects.

faq.question: Q5. What is the eligibility for Anganwadi Teacher and Helper posts in Telangana?
faq.answer: Candidates must be women residents of the same village/ward/thanda as the vacant AWC, generally aged 18–40 years, with a pass in 8th, 10th, or Intermediate depending on the post.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for Mahabubnagar Anganwadi recruitment?
faq.answer: AWT/AWH posts are honorarium-based community appointments, and these recruitment drives are generally conducted without any application fee; candidates can confirm with the local CDPO office for certainty.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for AWT/AWH posts in Mahabubnagar?
faq.answer: Selection is merit-based with no written exam - it involves application screening, document verification by the CDPO, merit list preparation, and final approval by the District Selection Committee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary of Anganwadi Teacher and Helper in Telangana?
faq.answer: An Anganwadi Teacher earns approximately ₹12,500–₹13,500 per month, while an Anganwadi Helper earns approximately ₹8,000 per month.

faq.question: Q9. Which ICDS project in Mahabubnagar has the most Anganwadi vacancies?
faq.answer: Jadcherla has the highest number of vacancies with 73 posts (24 AWT + 49 AWH), followed by Mahabubnagar Urban (45), Mahabubnagar Rural (43), and Devarkadra (16).

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for Mahabubnagar Anganwadi recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online at mis.tgwdcw.in by locating their AWC ID under Mahabubnagar district, filling the application form, uploading documents, and submitting before 30 June 2026.
